hooks.command: cd "C:/Paul/claude-code/cursoUdemy/First app claude code" && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then MSG=$(git diff --cached | head -c 6000 | claude -p --safe-mode --model haiku 'Write ONE git commit message line (conventional-commits style: type: short imperative summary, max 72 chars) that clearly describes this staged diff. Output ONLY the commit message text - no quotes, no markdown, no explanation.' 2>/dev/null | head -n 1 | tr -d '\r'); if [ -z "$MSG" ]; then MSG="chore: auto-backup $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; fi; git commit -m "$MSG" && git push origin master; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Fazendo backup das alterações no GitHub...
